title: Wilo's 1.7 Sword Blocking
description: Makes swords' blocking model emulate how it looked like during versions 1.7 and below!
body:
![Wilo's 1.7 Sword Blocking Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/667cf35bdcbbf9bf1b3ad30679fc8f88b831758e.png)

Recently there has been a lot of datapacks & plugins that have implemented/brought back pre-1.9 sword blocking mechanics! Although, by default, the game uses a model similar to 1.8's when blocking with the sword!

This resource pack makes the sword blocking model much closer and more faithful to the model/positioning from versions 1.7 and prior!

## ⭐ NOTE
This resource pack assumes that the datapack or plugin you are using for sword-blocking uses {animation:"block"} as most do! Another version of this resource pack will likely be uploaded in the future to support sword-blocking without {animation:"block"}

##
## ⚔️ Side-by-side comparison
